content.text: , I will create a ticket specifically for clock-simple module and have it under
as one of the child tickets.
QA Testing Steps — Clock Simple PWA
✅ Should redirect to the Clock Simple screen
✅ Invalid credentials should show an error message and not proceed
The date picker defaults to today's date
Change the date to a previous date within the current week
✅ Current Period(s) section should load existing timesheet data for that date
✅ Dates outside the current week should not be selectable
✅ Future dates should not be selectable
Select a date that has existing timesheet data
with correct time, WO, truck, and lunch duration values
✅ A new period form should appear under
✅ Total hours should update automatically based on time in/out
Try saving without filling required fields
Try saving without selecting a lunch option
"You must select a lunch option for all periods before saving."
Try saving with no periods added
"You need to add a period at least."
Add a valid period and click
✅ Saved period should now appear under
Select a date where the timesheet has already been manager-approved
Try adding a new period and saving
"No periods can be entered! The timesheet for the week of this exception has been approved already..."
Log in with a salary user account
"SALARY user can not add any periods."
"SALARY user can not submit any timesheet."

When I click on the date, it should give me a pop up calendar to choose a date. Looks like there is a small box on the left of the date field. I just can’t see it. The dark blue fields don’t stick out too well.
Resolution Summary: Fixed date picker UX and updated PWA theme colors to match the React Native app.
Date Picker Fix: Tapping anywhere on the date input field now opens the calendar popup. Previously only a tiny, nearly invisible native browser icon triggered it.
Theme Update: Replaced all navy-blue theme colors (#1a1a2e, #16213e, #0f3460) with the RN app green theme (#0f363b, #0a1f27, #0e5452) across all pages and components.
src/app/globals.css - Updated background colors, added date picker CSS
src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx - Updated all default theme colors
Commits: Frontend Git: SM-1077 branch, commit 7ee205a, merged to develop
Tap/click on the date input field - a calendar popup should appear immediately (no need to find a tiny icon)
Verify the overall color theme is a dark green/teal (matching the RN mobile app) instead of navy blue
Check other pages (Timesheet, Expenses, Work Orders, Close Outs) also reflect the green theme
Check the 404 page and toast notifications also use the updated theme

The WO field is searching, but it isn’t pulling a list of work orders when you put in a number. I put in 1, normally on the mobile app, it would pull all WOs with a 1 in it. It makes you click on the arrow to show the WOs. On the app it automatically showed the drop down showing all WOs.
Verify Total hours should update automatically based on time in/out
Try saving without filling required fields
Verified Should show appropriate error messages
Try saving without selecting a lunch option
"You must select a lunch option for all periods before saving."
Try saving with no periods added
"You need to add a period at least."
Instead, it told me to add a valid lunch time. It should work through the required fields with the warnings. The Time period should be valid and if not a warning for that should be first.
Add a valid period and click
Verified Saved period should now appear under
Select a date where the timesheet has already been manager-approved
Try adding a new period and saving
"No periods can be entered! The timesheet for the week of this exception has been approved already..."
I was able to override my previously approved timesheet. According to the statement above, I should not be able to.
Log in with a salary user account
"SALARY user can not add any periods."
"SALARY user can not submit any timesheet."
Resolution Summary: Fixed multiple QA-reported issues in Clock Simple module.
Time Picker: Hidden native clock icons, tapping anywhere on In/Out fields opens time picker (same fix as date picker)
WO Dropdown: Rewritten SMAsyncSelectPicker to auto-show search results as a visible list instead of requiring a click on the native select. Selected WO label now persists after selection.
Lunch Duration: Added missing label (Site Manager Required Selection for Daily Meal Compliance) on read-only PeriodItem. Fixed value not displaying by parsing lunch_duration as number from API.

Validation Order: Centralized validation to check in form order - Time period first, then WO/Site, then Lunch. Save button now shows specific per-period errors (e.g. Period 1: Please select a valid time period) instead of generic message.

Approval Blocking: Add Period and Save buttons are now disabled and dimmed when timesheet is approved or user is salary. Added approval check to addClockPeriod function. Approval notice displayed below buttons.
Salary User: hawseyl on test server is correctly identified as Salary user (hours_exempt=1 in DB). This is expected behavior per AC7.
Commits: Frontend Git: SM-1077 branch, commit 3bb7cb5, merged to develop
Time Picker: Click anywhere on In/Out time fields - time picker should open without needing to find a small icon
WO Search: Type a number in the WO search box - results should auto-appear as a list below. Select a WO - its name should display in the selected row
Lunch: Verify lunch dropdown shows label and selected value in both Current and New periods

Validation: Add a period without setting time, click Save - should show "Period 1: Please select a valid time period." Set time, leave lunch empty, click Save - should show "Period 1: Please select a lunch option."
Approval: Use an approved timesheet date - Add Period and Save buttons should be grayed out with approval notice shown
Salary: Login as hawseyl (salary user) - should see "Salary user." message and disabled buttons
User should be able to click on the in and out time and manually adjust the time as well as having the option to use the drop down.
Verified the lunch shows up when viewing in current periods.
Verified the WO automatically shows WOs that user can choose from quickly vs. a drop down.
WO field is keeping my search and duplicating N/A when searching. See screenshots.
Resolution Summary: Fixed time input typing and rewrote WO picker as a full-screen modal mirroring the React Native app behavior.

Time Input: Removed forced showPicker on click that was blocking typing. Time inputs now allow direct keyboard typing (HH:MM) AND tapping the picker icon (now visible with light/inverted color for the dark theme) to use the dropdown. Both methods work.

WO Dropdown: Rewrote SMAsyncSelectPicker as a full-screen modal that opens when tapping the selector button (mirrors RN implementation). The selector shows the currently selected label with a down chevron. Tapping opens a modal with title header, close button, search input at top, and selectable list below. Selecting an item closes the modal and updates the value.

Eliminated Duplicate N/A: Previous implementation had the search field and selected display stacked together in the form, causing N/A to appear twice. The new modal-based approach moves search inside the modal only.
Commits: Frontend Git: SM-1077 branch, commit d7f731f, merged to develop
